cot_prefix: Okay, let's solve this. The question is about finding the date one week from the last day of 1899. The options are given, so I need to figure out which one is correct. First, the last day of 1899 would be December 31, 1899. So if we add one week to that date, we need to add seven days. Let's do that day by day. Starting from December 31, 1899: - Adding one day would be January 1, 1900. - Adding another day is January 2, 1900. - Third day: January 3, 1900. - Fourth day: January 4, 1900. - Fifth day: January 5, 1900. - Sixth day: January 6, 1900. - Seventh day: January 7, 1900. So, one week from December 31, 1899 would be January 7, 1900. Let me check the options given to match this date. Looking at the options, option (D) is 01/07/1900, which matches the date we calculated. The other options don't match. For example, option (A) is February 7, 1900, which is more than a month away from December 31. Option (C) is January 13, which is two weeks away. So option (D) is the correct one. Let me double-check to make sure I didn't make any mistakes. December has 31 days, so December 31
